message.content:
Explore the .claude folder and any hooks configuration:
1. Read .claude/settings.json completely
2. Read all files in .claude/hooks/ folder
3. Identify what hooks exist (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, etc.)
4. Document what each hook does
5. Identify any gaps (e.g., missing Edit hook mentioned in research)

Also check for .agentrc.ts if it exists and document its configuration.

Provide exact file paths and complete content analysis.

content.text: I'll explore the .claude folder and hooks configuration to provide you with a complete analysis.
